title: Invisible Shield
description: This pack makes the shield invisible in the player's hand, but not the inventory
body:
Ever tired of the shield getting in your way visually?
Maybe you just want to look like you can take a hit.

Well no matter, this pack solves your problem!

![Depiction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1511bb37954a07b5b061b6c0ada11c679ff1ed30.png)

This pack turns the shield invisible in your hand, but not your hotbar

or inventory so you know whether or not it's broken

 

Like this pack?

Follow me on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pekitp/projects), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/PekitP), or [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pekitp/)
